mapper.sql: id, org_id, supply_reason, start_time, end_time, affected_households, remark, status, create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT sp.id, sp.org_id, sp.supply_reason AS supplyType, sp.start_time AS planStartTime, sp.end_time AS planEndTime, sp.affected_households AS affectHouseholds, sp.remark AS remarks, sp.status AS supplyStatus, sp.create_time AS createTime, sp.create_id AS createUser, sp.update_time AS updateTime, sp.update_id AS updateUser, org.organization_name AS enterpriseName, san.district_code, san.street_code, san.detail_address FROM gs_supply_plan sp LEFT JOIN tbl_organization org ON sp.org_id = org.id AND org.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gs_supply_area_node san ON sp.org_id = san.org_id AND san.deleted = 0 WHERE sp.id = #{id} AND sp.deleted = 0
